hero.description: I lead the Azure Logic Apps UX team at
hero.descriptionCont: helping millions of developers build cloud integrations. Outside of work, I'm a private pilot and aviation enthusiast.

about.title: About Me
about.intro: I'm Travis, an engineering manager with experience at Microsoft and Facebook. Currently, I lead a team of 7 engineers working on Azure Logic Apps, focusing on integration platforms that serve developers globally.
about.expertise: My background covers modern web development, cloud architecture, and distributed systems. I focus on building healthy teams that can solve complex technical challenges and deliver reliable software.
about.personal: Outside of work, I'm a private pilot who enjoys the precision of aviation. I'm also a motorcycle enthusiast and enjoy traveling to Disney World. These interests help me maintain a balanced perspective on leadership and life.

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: Over a decade of experience building scalable software solutions and leading high-performing teams.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Thoughts on technology, leadership, and software engineering
blog.emptyState: Blog posts coming soon! Check back later for insights on technology and leadership.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: I'm interested in engineering leadership, cloud architecture, and developer tools. Feel free to reach out if you'd like to connect.
contact.openToValue: Strategic consulting, technical advisory roles, speaking engagements, and engineering leadership discussions
contact.subject: Subject
contact.messagePlaceholderLong: Tell me about your project or just say hello!

footer.tagline: Software developer, manager, and amateur pilot building the future of cloud integration.
